---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Core Builds.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is (e.g., buffering on TorBox, RD filtering not working, formatter UI is broken).

**Which Core Build are you using?**
- [ ] Core Nexus 1080p SDR (Single)
- [ ] Core Nexus 4K Home Theater (Single)
- [ ] Dual Core 1080p SDR (Safe Edition)
- [ ] Dual Core 4K Unleashed (Safe Edition)
- [ ] Custom / Modified Build

**Hardware & Setup Details:**
 - Device: [e.g. Nvidia Shield, Chromecast w/ Google TV, Windows PC]
 - Display: [e.g. 1080p TV, 4K HDR Projector]
 - AIOStreams Host: [e.g. Localhost, ForTheWeak Cloud]
 - Stremio Version: [e.g. 1.6.11]

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Imported template '...'
2. Searched for movie/show '...'
3. Clicked on link '...'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem (especially for Formatter visual bugs).
